title: pilea repens
intro: Pilea repens, also known as the friendship plant or aluminum plant, is a low-maintenance, creeping plant native to China. The medicinal properties of Pilea repens include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Pilea repens include improving digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, by infusing the leaves in hot water, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
